$comment: scripts/OaksLab.asm OaksLabRivalChallengesPlayerScript — heading for the exit (YCoord == 6) with a starter but before the first rival battle. Fully authored (wave C): the rival turns south, the player faces him, MEET_RIVAL strikes up, he calls the challenge from where he stands and only THEN walks over for the battle (OPP_RIVAL1's party by the player's starter). The battle never whites you out (OaksLabRivalEndBattle); HealParty runs win or lose; his 20-frame beat, the goodbye, Music_RivalAlternateStart for the walk-out, and he leaves the lab for good.

commands.text:
{rival}: Wait
{player}!
Let's check out
our POKéMON! Come on, I'll take
you on!

then.text:
WHAT?
Unbelievable!
I picked the
wrong POKéMON!

else.text:
{rival}: Yeah! Am
I great or what?

commands.text:
{rival}: Okay!
I'll make my
POKéMON fight to
toughen it up! {player}! Gramps!
Smell you later!
